fields.description:
## Problem

`main` (origin/main HEAD 94e605a29) is red: `tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_hierarchy_incomplete.py::test_precheck_output_schema_accepts_old_and_new_shapes` fails deterministically with `agent output failed schema 'plan_review_precheck_output': 'review_phase' is a required property`.

## Root cause

Change 889 ("Add phased plan-review attestations") made `review_phase` a **required** property of `plan_review_precheck_output.schema.json` — correctly, since the precheck now always emits it (`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/__init__.py:561,690,720`). The test's `old_shape` fixture, which predates that change and omits `review_phase`, was never updated. Change 889 earned `Verified +1` on a patch set based on a pre-test base; Rebase-If-Necessary merged it at submit without re-running CI, so the semantically-broken combination landed green (ADR 0047 hazard).

## Fix

Add `"review_phase": "planning"` to the `old_shape` dict in `test_precheck_output_schema_accepts_old_and_new_shapes`. The field is now always emitted, so the fixture was simply stale; `new_shape` (built via `**old_shape`) inherits it. No production code changes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `old_shape` in `test_precheck_output_schema_accepts_old_and_new_shapes` includes `"review_phase": "planning"`, matching the now-required schema property.
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_hierarchy_incomplete.py` passes against origin/main src (all 12 tests green).
- [ ] `make lint` and `make typecheck` pass.
- [ ] No production/schema files are changed — the fix is test-only (the schema requirement is intentional).
- [ ] [operator-attested] Change lands through Gerrit with `LLM-Review +1` and `Verified +1`.
